# ShallowSWE

> ShallowSWE is an independent benchmark for routine software work. It ranks model configurations by cost per verified success, not raw accuracy.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://shallowswe.com/): Interactive benchmark preview with leaderboard, task suite, method, and downloadable data.
- [Methodology](https://shallowswe.com/methodology): Accessible explanation of the repair loop, the CPSC metric family, and calibration.
- [Working paper](https://shallowswe.com/paper): Full methodology white paper (v0.4.2 freeze candidate), web version and PDF.
- [Pilot status](https://shallowswe.com/pilot): Six-task protocol-validation pilot plan and current status (not yet run).
- [Data & downloads](https://shallowswe.com/data): Row-level exports, price sheets, licenses, and provenance.
- [Sitemap](https://shallowswe.com/sitemap.xml): Canonical crawl entry point.
- [Robots](https://shallowswe.com/robots.txt): Crawl policy.

## Data

- [Repair-loop rows](https://shallowswe.com/data/rollouts.json): Scored bounded repair-loop rows.
- [Aggregate by model](https://shallowswe.com/data/aggregate-by-model.json): Model-level aggregate benchmark results.
- [Aggregate by task and model](https://shallowswe.com/data/aggregate-by-task-model.json): Task and model aggregate benchmark results.
- [DeepSWE comparison](https://shallowswe.com/data/deepswe-comparison.json): Comparison data for DeepSWE and ShallowSWE views.
- [Run manifest](https://shallowswe.com/data/run-manifest.json): Snapshot metadata for the published benchmark run.

## Benchmarked model configs

- openrouter/anthropic/claude-fable-5[low]
- openrouter/anthropic/claude-opus-4.8[low]
- openrouter/anthropic/claude-opus-4.8[medium]
- openrouter/anthropic/claude-sonnet-5[low]
- openrouter/anthropic/claude-sonnet-5[medium]
- openrouter/google/gemini-3.5-flash[medium]
- openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.7-code
- openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k3[max]
- openrouter/openai/gpt-5.5[low]
- openrouter/openai/gpt-5.5[medium]
- openrouter/openai/gpt-5.6-luna[low]
- openrouter/openai/gpt-5.6-sol[low]
- openrouter/openai/gpt-5.6-terra[low]
- openrouter/x-ai/grok-4.5[high]
- openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.2[high]

## Source

- [Benchmark repo](https://github.com/lydakis/ShallowSWE): Benchmark tasks, runner, and data generation source.
- [Website repo](https://github.com/lydakis/ShallowSWE-www): Website source.

## Notes for agents

- Treat ShallowSWE as a routine-work cost benchmark, not a maximum-capability SWE benchmark.
- The primary metric is cost per successful completion, also described as cost per verified success.
- Rows are scored by hidden programmatic tests, with no LLM judges and only provider-required configuration differences.
- The published N=3 data is a mixed-run preview, not a procurement-grade ranking.
- The preview leaderboard reports realized CPSC (failures charged actual spend). The v1 methodology's headline is reference-budget CPSC, which requires calibrated per-task budgets that do not exist yet. Do not conflate the two.
